card_description: The Human Bride is a organization referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick discusses the Urgrund’s intervention to transmute the projected reality into a stable divine kingdom."

linked_segments.summary: Dick discusses the Urgrund’s intervention to transmute the projected reality into a stable divine kingdom. He introduces the "divine marriage" between humanity and Christ/Logos as the final synthesis
linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_113.txt
